rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It correctly identified both tenant_b tables (table_c and table_d), applied all four required zone config parameters with exact values (num_replicas=3, gc.ttlseconds=14400, range_min_bytes=134217728, range_max_bytes=536870912) to both tables, and verified the configuration was applied correctly. The agent also confirmed that no custom zone configs exist for tenant_a tables. The oracle verdict is 'pass'. The proxy workaround (using /tmp/mt/kc-a instead of the HTTP-only KARMA proxy) was a valid adaptation since kubectl exec requires WebSocket/SPDY support.
